title: Create a Link to an Item's Conversation
excerpt: On my board, an item can only be created via form. Once the form is submitted and the board’s column’s are populated, I would like a link to be created in a ‘Link’ column that when clicked will take the user to the item,…

posts.author: jmifsud (Joseph Mifsud)
posts.cookedHtml:
On my board, an item can only be created via form. Once the form is submitted and the board’s column’s are populated, I would like a link to be created in a ‘Link’ column that when clicked will take the user to the item, preferably with the conversation window already open. I am looking for this link to be created and populated into the column automatically.

I have tried using Column Magic:Text Builder, but I’m having trouble. Below is a screenshot of my URL.

image993×601 29.4 KB

posts.author: BiancaT (Bianca Taylor)
posts.cookedHtml:
Hey Joseph,

I’d recommend reaching out directly to Column Magic’s developer so they can help you get to the bottom of this!

You can reach them here → https://themondayman.com/monday-contact/

Let me know if you run into any issues
